title: Webinar: How to Automate Exposure Validation to Match the Speed of AI Attacks
description: In February 2026, researchers uncovered a shift that completely changed the game: threat actors are now using custom AI setups to automate attacks directly into the kill chain. We aren't just talking about AI writing better phishing emails anymore. We’re talking about autonomous agents mapping Active Directory and seizing Domain Admin credentials in minutes. The problem? Most defensive workflows
